list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat: Implement voxel-based 3D Alpha/Beta biological masking
- Added dynamic UI table for structure role assignment (OAR vs Tumor). - Implemented Boolean spatial masking with NumPy to resolve structure overlaps. - Upgraded EQD2 math engine to process 3D alpha/beta matrices via broadcasting. - Enforced strict clinical safety rules (OAR overrides Tumor in intersections by default). - Added UI state management for safe data extraction prior to calculation.

task.summary: IMPLEMENTED LQL MODEL, NEEDS MORE REVISION
Cambio de nombre e inicio desarrollo fusion manaual avanzada

Feat: Add manual alignment rotation with progressive disclosure and BRAINSFit bypass.
Added manual pitch, roll, and yaw rotation sliders. Added logic to disable rotation controls during auto-registration to prevent BRAINSFit failures. Added support for 'Manual Only' registration mode.
"Feat: Added automatic UI reset for metric tables and DVH charts before new calculations")
"Feat: Added automatic UI reset for metric tables and DVH charts before new calculations")

feat: Implement voxel-based 3D Alpha/Beta biological masking
- Added dynamic UI table for structure role assignment (OAR vs Tumor). - Implemented Boolean spatial masking with NumPy to resolve structure overlaps. - Upgraded EQD2 math engine to process 3D alpha/beta matrices via broadcasting. - Enforced strict clinical safety rules (OAR overrides Tumor in intersections by default). - Added UI state management for safe data extraction prior to calculation.

feat: Implement voxel-based 3D Alpha/Beta biological masking
- Added dynamic UI table for structure role assignment (OAR vs Tumor). - Implemented Boolean spatial masking with NumPy to resolve structure overlaps. - Upgraded EQD2 math engine to process 3D alpha/beta matrices via broadcasting. - Enforced strict clinical safety rules (OAR overrides Tumor in intersections by default). - Added UI state management for safe data extraction prior to calculation.

MESSAGE.value: IMPLEMENTED LQL MODEL, NEEDS MORE REVISION
Cambio de nombre e inicio desarrollo fusion manaual avanzada

Feat: Add manual alignment rotation with progressive disclosure and BRAINSFit bypass.
Added manual pitch, roll, and yaw rotation sliders. Added logic to disable rotation controls during auto-registration to prevent BRAINSFit failures. Added support for 'Manual Only' registration mode.
"Feat: Added automatic UI reset for metric tables and DVH charts before new calculations")

feat: Implement voxel-based 3D Alpha/Beta biological masking
- Added dynamic UI table for structure role assignment (OAR vs Tumor). - Implemented Boolean spatial masking with NumPy to resolve structure overlaps. - Upgraded EQD2 math engine to process 3D alpha/beta matrices via broadcasting. - Enforced strict clinical safety rules (OAR overrides Tumor in intersections by default). - Added UI state management for safe data extraction prior to calculation.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat: Implement voxel-based 3D Alpha/Beta biological masking
- Added dynamic UI table for structure role assignment (OAR vs Tumor). - Implemented Boolean spatial masking with NumPy to resolve structure overlaps. - Upgraded EQD2 math engine to process 3D alpha/beta matrices via broadcasting. - Enforced strict clinical safety rules (OAR overrides Tumor in intersections by default). - Added UI state management for safe data extraction prior to calculation.
